trending_videos.title: Spider-Man: Brand New Day - Official Trailer
trending_videos.description:
A Brand New Day starts now.
Watch the official trailer for #SpiderManBrandNewDay, exclusively in theatres July 31. Play Marvel’s Spider-Man 2, available now in the PlayStation Plus Game Catalog.

trending_videos.title: First Four: Miami (Ohio) vs. SMU
trending_videos.description: The No. 11 Miami RedHawks and the No. 11 SMU Mustangs face off in the First Four round of the 2026 NCAA Tournament at UD Arena. The winner will advance as the No. 11 seed in the Midwest Region to face the sixth-seeded Tennessee Volunteers.

trending_videos.title: Dune: Part Three | Official Teaser Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Experience the epic conclusion. Dune: Part Three only in theaters December 18 #DuneMovie #FilmedforIMAX

Directed by Denis Villeneuve and written by Villeneuve and Brian K. Vaughan, Dune: Part Three is based on the novel Dune Messiah by Frank Herbert and delivers the epic conclusion to Villeneuve’s trilogy. The film stars Timothée Chalamet, Zendaya, Jason Momoa, Florence Pugh, Rebecca Ferguson, Isaach De Bankolé, with Charlotte Rampling, with Anya Taylor-Joy, and Robert Pattinson, and Javier Bardem, and features newcomers Nakoa-Wolf Momoa and Ida Brooke.

trending_videos.title: America's Newsroom
trending_videos.description: Bill Hemmer and Dana Perino cover current events happening around the nation and the world; guests pertinent to the news topics are interviewed, and viewer emails are also answered by the anchors and guests.

Paramount Pictures has some of the most powerful brands in filmed entertainment, including Paramount Pictures and Paramount Animation. PPC operations also include Paramount Home Entertainment, Paramount Pictures International, Paramount Licensing Inc., and Paramount Studio Group.

trending_videos.title: Los Angeles Lakers at Houston Rockets
trending_videos.description: The Los Angeles Lakers travel to face the Houston Rockets for a high-stakes Western Conference clash at the Toyota Center. The Rockets lead the season series 1-0 when they 119-96 in Los Angeles. Luka Dončić leads the Lakers with nearly 33 PPG.

trending_videos.title: Cryo Archive Launch Trailer | Marathon
trending_videos.description:
//: ALL NODES RESOLVED 
//: UESC MARATHON ACCESS: INITIATED 
|| countdown engaged 
|| the marathon is waking 

The final ARG puzzle has been resolved in a massive community effort orchestrated by #breach-protocol in the official Marathon Discord. 

But this isn’t the end. Aboard the Marathon, you’ll face labyrinthian corridors, raid-like puzzles, and seven frozen Vaults leading to an entity even the UESC fears. 
 
The Marathon is waking. Prepare. Coming March 20, 2026. 

Purchase Marathon now:
Steam: https://store.steampowered.com/app/3065800/Marathon/
PlayStation 5: https://www.playstation.com/en-us/games/marathon/
Xbox Series X|S: https://www.microsoft.com/store/productid/9p8mgmxndv9b

Follow Marathon:
TikTok: https://tiktok.com/@marathonthegame
Instagram: https://instagram.com/marathonthegame
Twitter: https://x.com/marathonthegame
Bluesky: https://bsky.app/profile/marathonthegame.bungie.net
Discord: https://discord.gg/marathonthegame

trending_videos.title: CNN News Central
trending_videos.description: The latest news from around the world live from CNN's immersive news hub with John Berman, Kate Bolduan and Sara Sidner.

trending_videos.title: Eros Ramazzotti - Otra Como Tú  (Letra)
trending_videos.description:
🎸 Bienvenido al canal — música con letra para cantar y sentir cada canción.

🔔 Suscríbete y activa la campana para más **videos con letra de rock, baladas y pop rock** de tus artistas favoritos.

🎧Escucha la canción original aquí:
👉 https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=3eoYeuTDrao&list=RD3eoYeuTDrao&start_radio=1

✨ En este canal encontrarás **rock en español, baladas románticas y pop rock** con letras para cantar, dedicar o recordar grandes canciones.

¿Dónde la encontraría?

Otra mujer

Con iguales emociones
Con las expresiones

Con esa mirada atenta
A mi indiferencia

trending_videos.title: Fortnite Chapter 7 Season 2: Showdown | Battle Pass Trailer
trending_videos.description:
Join Team Foundation or Team Ice King and lead your team to victory to unlock new weapons, items, and rewards during the Season. The winning team at the end of the Season decides the final reward: everyone with the Battle Pass unlocks either Frost-Ready Foundation or Exalted Frost Ice King. 

Get the Pass for 800 V-Bucks or with Fortnite Crew to instantly unlock Exalted Ice King. Pick up the Pass before March 26 at 11:59 PM ET and claim the launch week exclusive Stealth Tech Foundation bonus Style and accessories. 

Level up to earn premium rewards like the Ice Prince Sidekick, Ice King’s Frostwalkers Kicks, and Outfits like The Order (Reforged), Elite Jules, and Bugs Bunny.

entertainment_dominance.description: The majority of trending videos fall within the entertainment category, including movie trailers and sports events.
entertainment_dominance.data_support: 6 out of 10 videos are entertainment-related, including trailers for Spider-Man, Dune, and Sonic the Hedgehog.

news_content.description: News content remains relevant and is likely to appear on trending lists, indicating a sustained viewer interest in current events.
news_content.data_support: Two videos are news-related (America's Newsroom, CNN News Central), showing a 20% representation.

gaming_interest.description: Gaming-related content, such as trailers and reveals, continues to capture significant viewer attention.
gaming_interest.data_support: Fortnite's Battle Pass Trailer and PlayStation's Marathon trailer highlight gaming's ongoing trend.

brand_power.description: Established brands and networks have a strong presence on trending lists, likely due to their large follower bases and marketing prowess.
brand_power.data_support: Prominent channels like Warner Bros., PlayStation, and Paramount Pictures each have a trending video.

sports_content.description: Sports events, particularly high-profile games, are regularly featured in trending content, leveraging live viewership spikes.
sports_content.data_support: The video 'Los Angeles Lakers at Houston Rockets' demonstrates the draw of sports-related content.

cross-category collaborations.description: There is potential for unique cross-category collaborations, such as combining elements of entertainment and gaming.
cross-category collaborations.actionable_insights: Consider collaborations between gaming companies and entertainment studios to create hybrid content that can appeal to multiple audience segments.

localization of content.description: Localized content, such as music or regional entertainment, could tap into niche markets and expand reach.
localization of content.actionable_insights: Produce region-specific versions or subtitles for content such as trailers and music videos to increase global engagement.

real-time engagement.description: Leveraging live events or real-time engagement can boost content visibility and interaction.
real-time engagement.actionable_insights: Capitalize on live streaming and interactive content formats, such as live Q&As or behind-the-scenes events, to enhance viewer engagement.

analysis.note: Transcript analysis is more detailed, metadata analysis provides broader trends
